MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SUN COUNTRY AIRLINES' MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Good cause appearing, the unopposed application of James A. Eastwood to appear pro hac vice in this matter is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SUN COUNTRY AIRLINES' MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Good cause appearing, the unopposed application of Mark A. Dombroff to appear pro hac vice in this matter is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
